Test files for ANCS, AMS, Bluetooth, GAP, GATT, and PPoGATT functionalities, plus a build script.


## Files
- **[ancs_test_data.h](ancs_test_data.h.md)**: Test data for ANCS communication in the Pebble firmware, including various notification dictionaries.
- **[test_ams.c](test_ams.c.md)**: Tests for AMS functionality in the Pebble firmware, including BLE characteristic handling and music service integration.
- **[test_ams_util.c](test_ams_util.c.md)**: Tests for `ams_util` functions, including `ams_util_float_string_parse` and `ams_util_csv_parse`, with various input scenarios.
- **[test_ancs.c](test_ancs.c.md)**: Tests for the ANCS (Apple Notification Center Service) message handling and notification processing in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_ancs_app_storage.c](test_ancs_app_storage.c.md)**: Tests for ANCS app storage functionality, including initialization, data saving, loading, and iteration.
- **[test_ancs_util.c](test_ancs_util.c.md)**: Tests for ANCS utility functions, including parsing notification attributes and detecting duplicates.
- **[test_bt_conn_mgr.c](test_bt_conn_mgr.c.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth connection manager functionality, including BLE latency management and response time handling.
- **[test_gap_le_advert.c](test_gap_le_advert.c.md)**: Tests for GAP LE advertising functionality in the Pebble firmware, including job scheduling, round-robin, and parameter validation.
- **[test_gap_le_connect.c](test_gap_le_connect.c.md)**: Unit tests for GAP LE connection functionality in the Pebble firmware, including connection intents, pairing, and event handling.
- **[test_gatt_client_accessors.c](test_gatt_client_accessors.c.md)**: Tests for GATT client accessors in the Pebble firmware, including service and characteristic discovery.
- **[test_gatt_client_discovery.c](test_gatt_client_discovery.c.md)**: Tests for GATT client discovery functionality in a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) context, including edge cases and watchdog timeout scenarios.
- **[test_gatt_client_subscriptions.c](test_gatt_client_subscriptions.c.md)**: Tests for GATT client subscription functionality, including subscription management, notification handling, and cleanup operations.
- **[test_gatt_service_changed_client.c](test_gatt_service_changed_client.c.md)**: Tests for GATT service change client functionality using fake and stubbed components.
- **[test_gatt_service_changed_server.c](test_gatt_service_changed_server.c.md)**: Tests for the GATT service changed server functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_kernel_le_client.c](test_kernel_le_client.c.md)**: Tests for the kernel LE client in the Pebble firmware, including stubs and helper functions.
- **[test_ppogatt.c](test_ppogatt.c.md)**: Tests for PPoGATT communication protocol in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, cleanup, session management, and error handling.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing various Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) components and utilities.
